news.t: PGIM Announces Strategic Enhancements to Equity ETF Platform

holdings.infoBox: PJUS is an equity ETF with a total of 96 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.93%, NVIDIA at 6.72%, Alphabet at 6.59%, Microsoft at 4.20%, and Amazon.com at 3.96%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison U.S. Core Equity ETF (PJUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed US equity ETF that seeks long-term capital appreciation through a risk-managed portfolio of US companies selected using proprietary fundamental research and portfolio construction techniques. PJUS was launched on May 20, 2026 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: PGIM Announces Strategic Enhancements to Equity ETF Platform
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Enhancements organize equity ETF lineup around core and focused strategies.
